Luka Luka , Mississippi , is located in Tishomingo county. It is a small town with a population of 3,028. Just south of the city is the Woodall Mountain, and this is the spot you want to go digging for rocks, crystals, and other minerals . There is an extensive deposit of red and yellow ocher. Luka - Rockhounding Location in MS rockhounding.org/us/ms/luka-ms Find Red Ocher, Yellow Ocher at Luka in MS. Access difficulty: N/A. Get directions, see photos, and read reviews from other rockhounds. Luka - Map View - rockhounding.org rockhounding.org/maps/us/ms/luka-ms View Luka on an interactive map. Rockhounding location map. What are things like in Luka mississippi : r/mississippi - Reddit www.reddit.com/r/mississippi/comments/fjb41s/what_are_things_like_in_luka_mississippi/ Well I've been offered the chance to move to luka mississippi and would like some insight. What is it like there? I know it's a small town in the northern part of the state, with a population of around 3,000 and predominantly white. As a young black man would i encounter any problems with the locals? But besides that what is there do in luka ?
